calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants J.W. Wood Company, Inc., And Evans Materials Supplies, Inc.
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Angie Diner, CSR 9581. Telephone: 415-551-0612.

Mario Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lawrence Ledford, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendants J.W. Wood Company, Inc. or Evans Materials & Supplies, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants J.W. Wood Company, Inc. and Evans Materials & Supplies, Inc. on December 20, 2013.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 28, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Lawrence Ledford, and against the Defaulted Defendants J.W. Wood Company, Inc. and Evans Materials & Supplies, Inc., as follows:

Defendant J.W. Wood Company, Inc.

Economic Damages - $50,000.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $300,000.00.
Total - $350,000.00.

Defendant Evans Materials & Supplies, Inc.

Economic Damages - $103,250.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $750,000.00.
Total - $853,250.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
